untranslatable_reason: Correlation coefficient is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. This is a statistical measure that requires price correlation analysis which is not provided by the allowed indicator set. ADX_14 is available but correlation coefficient calculation requires external data or a custom indicator not defined in the backtest engine.
translation_notes: Signal is a regime identification rule rather than a trade entry/exit system. It uses correlation coefficient (unavailable) below 0.25 to identify sideways markets and ADX_14 above 20 (converted from 0.20 which appears to be a scale error—ADX uses 0-100 scale) to identify trends. The smoothing instruction applies a 3-day moving average to stabilize erratic results. Cannot fully translate without correlation coefficient indicator support.
